arts.ttl: Inter Milan Finalise Buchanan Loan to Villarreal: Replacement Options Emerge
arts.sum: Inter Milan are set to part ways with Canadian winger Tajon Buchanan, who will join La Liga side Villarreal on loan with an option to buy. This move comes shortly after Inter finalized the transfer of Tomas Palacios to Monza, marking another significant departure during the January transfer window. The post Inter Milan Finalise Buchanan Loan to Villarreal: Replacement Options Emerge appeared first on FootItalia.com.

Inter Milan Eye Roma’s Zalewski Amidst Competition from De Zerbi
arts.sum: Inter Milan are looking to bolster their squad following the departures of Tomás Palacios to Monza and Tajon Buchanan's imminent move to Villarreal. The club's focus has shifted to strengthening their wide positions rather than central defence, still hoping for Acerbi's recovery.
